caption: Narendra Modi stands behind a brown wooden podium, delivering a speech against a backdrop of a green marble wall with geometric patterns. He is wearing a light-beige long-sleeved shirt paired with a white sleeveless Nehru jacket. Two thin black microphones are positioned on the podium in front of him. In the initial moments, he raises his right hand, pointing his index finger upward to emphasize a point. As the sequence progresses, he lowers his arm and rests his hands on the edges of the podium, shifting his gaze and facial expression while continuing to speak. To his right, a tall, cylindrical wooden pillar with gold accents and a small arrangement of pink flowers is visible. The camera remains stationary, focusing on his upper body and gestures throughout the clip.
